Wondershare DemoCreator V8.0 now compatible with macOS systems, ensuring seamless integration, per Oct. 21, 2024 update.
news.summary: In Vancouver, BC on October 21, 2024, Wondershare excitedly revealed that DemoCreator V8.0 has undergone a major update to enhance compatibility with macOS platforms. The latest version, V8.0, was recently launched by Wondershare DemoCreator, ensuring seamless integration with a range of systems. This update signifies a significant development for Mac users, marking an important step towards improved functionality and user experience.

Mitsubishi Electric's ME Innovation Fund invests in Formic Technologies Inc., the 8th investment to date, focused on industrial robots.
news.summary: In Tokyo, Mitsubishi Electric Corporation (TOKYO: 6503) revealed its investment in Formic Technologies Inc., a US-based startup specializing in industrial robot design, development, and maintenance on a subscription basis. This marks the eighth investment by Mitsubishi's ME Innovation Fund. With automation gaining traction in manufacturing and logistics due to labor shortages, the investment reflects a growing trend towards automated solutions in industries.

These figures are not audited and adhere to International Financial Reporting Standards set by the International Accounting Standards Board.

Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Dogecoin plunge post multi-month highs, Bitcoin at $66,950.69 (-3.28%), Ethereum at $2,631.99 (-4.26%), Dogecoin at $0.1421 (-2.13%). Sentiment turns bearish; Market sentiment at "Greed" as per analyst.
news.summary: Leading cryptocurrencies experienced a sudden decline in prices on Monday, mirroring a pullback in stocks. Bitcoin dropped by 3.28% to $66,950.69, after reaching a high of $69,000 the day before. Ethereum fell by 4.26% to $2,631.99, while Dogecoin saw a 2.13% decrease to $0.1421. Total cryptocurrency liquidations amounted to $204 million in the past 24 hours, wiping out over $174 million in long positions. Bitcoin's Open Interest fell by 2%, and Ethereum's speculative market contracted by 3.75%. This led to an increase in traders shorting Bitcoin versus those bullish on the asset. Despite the pullback, market sentiment remained in the "Greed" zone.

news.headline: Logitech reports Q2 FY2025 results: Sales $1.12B, up 6% in USD and constant currency. GAAP gross margin 43.6%, up 210 bps.
news.summary: In an ad hoc announcement made from Lausanne, Switzerland and San Jose, California, Logitech International (SIX: LOGN) announced its financial results for the second quarter of Fiscal Year 2025. The company reported sales of $1.12 billion, reflecting a 6 percent increase in both US dollars and constant currency compared to the same period in the previous year. The GAAP gross margin stood at 43.6 percent, marking a 210 basis points rise from the previous year's Q2. Additionally, the non-GAAP gross margin was reported at 44.1 percent.

news.headline: FPT & NUS Computing partner to advance AI with $50M joint investment over 5 years, aiming to drive research & talent dev.
news.summary: In Singapore, the School of Computing at the National University of Singapore (NUS Computing) has teamed up with FPT, a prominent global tech company from Vietnam, to progress the realm of artificial intelligence (AI). This joint effort involves a combined funding commitment of US$50 million, with contributions to be made by FPT, NUS, and additional stakeholders in the domestic and regional AI sectors within the upcoming five years. The goal of this collaboration is to propel innovative AI research and bolster the development of skilled professionals in the field.

news.headline: Ledger Live now supports THORChain for decentralized cross-chain swaps, making it easier to swap assets on various chains.
news.summary: Users will soon be able to exchange assets across different blockchains within the Ledger app through the decentralized liquidity protocol THORChain. This feature aims to enhance the functionality of the app, providing users with more flexibility in managing their assets. The integration of THORChain will enable seamless swapping of various cryptocurrencies on Ledger, streamlining the process for users. This move is expected to attract more users to the platform, with a significant increase in the number of transactions being projected. Overall, this development highlights Ledger's commitment to providing innovative solutions for its users and expanding the capabilities of its app.

news.headline: Bitcoin enthusiasts criticize Saylor as he supports 'too big to fail' banks, warning about the risk of custodians having excessive power.
news.summary: Michael Saylor, a prominent supporter of Bitcoin, has warned that custodians holding large amounts of Bitcoin could potentially abuse their power if users do not self-custody. Saylor emphasized the risk of centralization and the accumulation of power, emphasizing the importance of individuals holding their own Bitcoin assets to prevent custodians from gaining excessive control.

31 US teachers and students visit Chengnan Loong Lantern in Nanchang, China, per report from JXICC.
news.summary: In Nanchang, China on October 21st, 2024, a group of 31 teachers and students from Utah and Pennsylvania in the United States were hosted at the Chengnan Loong Lantern production base in Jiangxi Province. The visit was organized by the Jiangxi International Communication Center (JXICC).

Sentry Tire expands product line with cutting edges for loaders and 2 new rubber compounds: WR for durability and LH for heat reduction.
news.summary: A company based in Ontario, California, Sentry Tire & Rubber LLC, recently announced on October 21, 2024, their expansion of products by introducing cutting edges for loaders and unveiling two new rubber compounds. The first compound, WR (Wear Resistant), aims to enhance durability, while the second compound, LH (Low Heat), is designed to reduce heat buildup, ultimately improving performance. The advancements made by Sentry Tire & Rubber LLC are significant as they strive to cater to the needs of their customers by offering innovative solutions.

Mustang Energy Corp gains exploration permits for Ford Lake Project, approved for eligibility with DTC and OTC Markets.
news.summary: Mustang Energy has been granted exploration permits for the Ford Lake Project. In addition, they have received eligibility approval from The Depository Trust Company and OTC Markets. This signifies a significant step forward for the company as they look to expand their operations. The permits and approvals will allow Mustang Energy to proceed with their exploration activities for the Ford Lake Project, a valuable opportunity for the company. This development highlights the potential growth and progress being made by Mustang Energy in the energy sector.

Black & Veatch to oversee construction of 500MW Miri CCGT Power Plant in Sarawak, Malaysia for PETROS Power, aiming to reduce emissions.
news.summary: In SARAWAK, Malaysia, Black & Veatch, a critical infrastructure solutions provider, selected as owner’s engineer for PETROS Power Sdn Bhd’s Miri Combined Cycle Gas Turbine (Miri CCGT) Power Plant. This plant will offer a cleaner option compared to coal-fired plants and is anticipated to generate 500 MW. The Miri CCGT Power Plant aims to provide power to the Sarawak State Grid.

news.headline: VeriSilicon's DeWarp Processing IP DW200-FS obtains ISO 26262 ASIL B certification for automotive safety.
news.summary: VeriSilicon revealed today in Shanghai that their DeWarp Processing IP DW200-FS has obtained ISO 26262 ASIL B certification for automotive functional safety.
